vulnerabilities.title: SVGO DoS through entity expansion in DOCTYPE (Billion Laughs)
vulnerabilities.description:
### Summary

SVGO accepts XML with custom entities, without guards against entity expansion or recursion. This can result in a small XML file (811 bytes) stalling the application and even crashing the Node.js process with `JavaScript heap out of memory`.

### Details

The upstream XML parser ([sax](https://www.npmjs.com/package/sax)) doesn't interpret custom XML entities by default. We pattern matched custom XML entities from the `DOCTYPE`, inserting them into `parser.ENTITIES`, and enabled `unp
